mapper.select: select '学生总数' as title, count(*) as value, '人' as unit from campus_student where status = '0' union all select '教师总数' as title, count(*) as value, '人' as unit from campus_teacher where status = '0' union all select '当前课程' as title, count(distinct s.course_id) as value, '门' as unit from campus_course_section s inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where term.current_flag = 'Y' union all select '考试安排' as title, count(*) as value, '场' as unit from campus_exam
select course_type as name, count(*) as value from campus_course where status = '0' group by course_type order by value desc
select college_name as name, count(*) as value from campus_student where status = '0' group by college_name order by value desc

select term.term_name as name, round(avg(score.score), 2) as value from campus_score score inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = score.section_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id group by term.term_id, term.term_name, term.start_date order by term.start_date
